title: Curator pass: archived napkin coverage audit routed
body: Follow-up solo curator coverage audit complete. Added pending-graduations routes for uncovered archived napkin families: /remember plugin write-time contract, plan-directory taxonomy, PDR-075 status review, parallel-reserve capacity, owner-coordinated compaction refocus, arriving-agent boundary dormancy, and Monitor first-run backfill. Markdownlint and diff check passed. Fitness remains CRITICAL as structural pressure on distilled, pending-graduations, and repo-continuity; no knowledge was trimmed.
